source_name: 上海交通大学计算机系-教师名录

extra.name: 黄维然
research_areas: 模型的高效微调和持续学习
extra.bio: Weiran Huang is an Associate Professor at Shanghai Jiao Tong University and a Research Consultant at Shanghai AI Lab. He was named a 2024 Microsoft Research Asia StarTrack Scholar (one of 17 globally). He earned his Ph.D. in computer science from Tsinghua University, during which he visited Harvard University, and his bachelor’s degree in electronic engineering from Tsinghua University. His research focuses on efficient fine-tuning and continual learning of large models. He established the MIFA Lab at SJTU in 2022 and has published over 30 papers in top AI conferences such as NeurIPS, ICML, and ICML. His achievements include being a finalist for the ICCV 2023 Best Paper Award (17 out of 8,260) for his work on noisy-label and long-tailed recognition, as well as leading his team to first place in the NeurIPS 2023 competition on large-model-based medical image classification. He has received funding from the National Natural Science Foundation of China, the Opening Project of the State Key Laboratory of General Artificial Intelligence, and corporate research sponsors including Doubao AI, Tencent WeChat, Baidu, and Microsoft Research Asia.

extra.name: 赵世振
extra.bio: My research interests are in the analysis, control and optimization of wireless networks, smart grid, and software defined networks.
